'''gadowo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:olay|olay]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-d-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:olay|olay]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gadowo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gædeweth|gædeweth]] || [[word:gædewej|gædewej]] || [[word:gædewesh|gædewesh]] || [[word:gædewe|gædewe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gadodowoth|gadodowoth]] || [[word:gadodowoj|gadodowoj]] || [[word:gadodowosh|gadodowosh]] || [[word:gadodowo|gadodowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gadowoth|gadowoth]] || [[word:gadowoj|gadowoj]] || [[word:gadowosh|gadowosh]] || [[word:gadowo|gadowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gadofwofth|gadofwofth]] || [[word:gadofwofj|gadofwofj]] || [[word:gadofwofsh|gadofwofsh]] || [[word:gadofwof|gadofwof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gadowotho|gadowotho]] || [[word:gadowojo|gadowojo]] || [[word:gadowosho|gadowosho]] || [[word:gadowoko|gadowoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gadowoth|gadowoth]] || [[word:gadowoj|gadowoj]] || [[word:gadowosh|gadowosh]] || [[word:gadowo|gadowo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gadowothol|gadowothol]] || [[word:gadowojol|gadowojol]] || [[word:gadowoshol|gadowoshol]] || [[word:gadowokol|gadowokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gadowoothotho|gadowoothotho]] || [[word:gadowoojojo|gadowoojojo]] || [[word:gadowooshosho|gadowooshosho]] || [[word:gadowooko|gadowooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gadowothon|gadowothon]] || [[word:gadowojon|gadowojon]] || [[word:gadowoshon|gadowoshon]] || [[word:gadowokon|gadowokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gadowothooro|gadowothooro]] || [[word:gadowojooro|gadowojooro]] || [[word:gadowoshooro|gadowoshooro]] || [[word:gadowokooro|gadowokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1a7b009}}
